findings.location: s4 — 別ウィンドウのJSP実装例
findings.description: The `<n:form name="downloadForm">` wrapper element is omitted from the sub-window JSP example. The source explicitly shows `n:downloadSubmit` and `n:button` nested inside `<n:form name="downloadForm">`, which is part of the correct implementation structure for this pattern.
findings.source_evidence:
<n:form name="downloadForm">
    <n:downloadSubmit type="button" uri="/action/ss11AC/W11AC02Action/TempFile"
                      name="submit" value="ダウンロード" allowDoubleSubmission="false" />
    <n:button uri="#" name="close" onclick="window.close();" displayMethod="NORMAL">閉じる</n:button>
</n:form>

findings.location: s4 — 別ウィンドウのJSP実装例
findings.description: The implementation tip about hiding the download button using CSS (`style="display: none;"`) is not included. The source explicitly calls this out as a technique developers should use when they do not want to display the download button visually.
findings.source_evidence:
<%-- 【説明】
      ダウンロードボタンを表示したくない場合は、
      「style="display: none;"」などCSSを使用する。 --%>
